branch_event.subject: PG&E Financial Power Deal
branch_event.snippet:
Larry Joe Hunter
05/12/99 02:03 PM
To: Kelly Minear/HOU/ECT@ECT
cc: Dale Neuner/HOU/ECT@ECT, Sara Shackleton/HOU/ECT@ECT 
Subject: PG&E Financial Power Deal

Kelly,

On 5/11 we traded a Financial Power deal with PG&E Energy Trading - Power 
L.P., EW9838.  We had previously been notified by Credit/Legal that no 
Financial Power deals were to be done with this C/P.  Please advise.

Thanks,
Joe

content_notice: Historical email bodies are built from Rosetta excerpts and event metadata. They are grounded, but they are not full original messages.

historical_business_state.summary: Recorded business state centers on exposure risk and approval and escalation pressure.

indicators.label: Exposure risk
indicators.summary: Exposure risk is moderate in the recorded path.

indicators.label: Approval and escalation pressure
indicators.summary: Approval and escalation pressure is moderate in the recorded path.

indicators.label: Relationship stability
indicators.summary: Relationship stability looks strong in the recorded path.

indicators.label: Commercial position
indicators.summary: Commercial position looks strong in the recorded path.

indicators.label: Internal handling load
indicators.summary: Internal handling load stays limited in the recorded path.

indicators.label: Execution delay
indicators.summary: Execution delay stays limited in the recorded path.

implications: Exposure risk is moderate in the recorded path.
Approval and escalation pressure is moderate in the recorded path.
Relationship stability looks strong in the recorded path.
